reviews.author: Naman Khurana
reviews.title: Perfect Gift Choice
reviews.body: Gift diya tha, receive karne wale ko bahut pasand aaya.

reviews.author: Arshad Naqvi
reviews.body: Sab log pendant ke design ke baare mein poochte hain

reviews.author: Manav Arora
reviews.body: Kisi ko gift karne ke liye perfect jewellery piece hai 👌

reviews.author: Mayank Kalra
reviews.body: Roz pehenne ke liye simple aur elegant option hai.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text: Material – Made of brass with a premium 24k gold-tone plated finish. Design – Turtle-inspired pendant with a glowing shell look and elegant detailing. Crystal Used – Pyrite crystal infused at the back with resin work. Chain – Comes with a stylish golden veloré chain for a ready-to-wear look. • • Designed with Care. Crafted with Soul.
